---
title: "Duke Mohun Yonge"
---

## Duke Mohun Yonge

**Dates:** (1869-1948)

### Description

cousin of CMY, solicitor

### Biography

He was the third son of the Rev. Duke Yonge of Puslinch and Charlotte Pode.  He married (1894) Isabella Sydney Bowen.  His elder brother Charles married her sister Catherine Ada Helena Bowen in 1899.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
